---
title: "Spatial_HD_FALC"
author: "HWC"
date: "2026-07-22"
output:
  html_document:
    keep_md: true
    toc: true
    self_contained: true
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
options(width = 100)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, dev = c("png", "pdf"))
seed <- 1234
```


```{r library, include=FALSE}

## Greneral packages
library(ExploreSCdataSeurat3)
library(runSeurat3)
library(Seurat)
library(ggpubr)
library(pheatmap)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(viridis)
library(muscat)
library(circlize)
library(destiny)
library(scater)
library(metap)
library(multtest)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(msigdbr)
library(enrichplot)
library(DOSE)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)
library(ggupset)
library(VennDiagram)
library(NCmisc)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(magrittr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(scRepertoire)
library(writexl)
library (scDblFinder)
library (BiocParallel)
library(harmony)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
library(patchwork)

library(SpatialExperiment)
library(scuttle)
library(scater)
library(HDF5Array)
library(SpatialFeatureExperiment)
library(ggspavis)
library(Voyager)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scran)

library(Banksy)
library(BayesSpace)
library(igraph)
library(nnSVG)

```


## Data input
```{r Data input}

obj1 <- readRDS("/R/2026_Spatial_alignment/probe based_20260721/426181_2-20260707_Hu_PericardFALC_pat1_squD_S1_L001_8um.rds")


obj2 <- readRDS("/R/2026_Spatial_alignment/probe based_20260721/426181_2-20260707_Hu_PericardFALC_pat1_squD_S1_L001_16um.rds")


sce_obj1 <- as.SingleCellExperiment(obj1)
sce_obj2 <- as.SingleCellExperiment(obj2)


# 3. Verify the conversion
sce_obj1
sce_obj2



```

## SCT normalization
```{r SCT normalization}
seurat_names <- c("obj1", "obj2")

sce_list <- list()  # holds the 2 separate results

for (nm in seurat_names) {
  message("Processing native Seurat object: ", nm)
  seu_obj <- get(nm)

  active_assay <- DefaultAssay(seu_obj)
  message("  Found active assay: '", active_assay, "'")

  seu_obj <- seu_obj[, colSums(GetAssayData(seu_obj, assay = active_assay, slot = "counts")) > 0]
  seu_obj <- SCTransform(seu_obj, assay = active_assay, verbose = FALSE)

  sce_final <- as.SingleCellExperiment(seu_obj)

  sct_residual_matrix <- matrix(
    0,
    nrow = nrow(sce_final),
    ncol = ncol(sce_final),
    dimnames = list(rownames(sce_final), colnames(sce_final))
  )
  computed_residuals <- seu_obj[["SCT"]]$scale.data
  matching_genes <- intersect(rownames(sct_residual_matrix), rownames(computed_residuals))
  sct_residual_matrix[matching_genes, ] <- computed_residuals[matching_genes, ]

  assays(sce_final)[["SCT_residuals"]] <- sct_residual_matrix

  hvg_genes <- VariableFeatures(seu_obj)
  rowData(sce_final)$hvg <- rownames(sce_final) %in% hvg_genes
  metadata(sce_final)$sct_hvgs <- VariableFeatures(seu_obj)
  sce_list[[nm]] <- sce_final   # keep them separate, indexed by name
  message("  Successfully stored normalized container for: ", nm)
}



```

##Ploting of TOP20 genes
```{r Ploting of TOP20 genes}

hvg_plots <- list()

for (nm in c("obj1", "obj2")) {

  sce_obj <- sce_list[[nm]]
  message("Processing: ", nm)

  # --- sanity: logcounts here is SCT's 'data' slot, not a fresh lognorm ---
  if (!"logcounts" %in% assayNames(sce_obj)) {
    stop("No logcounts in ", nm, " - check what as.SingleCellExperiment() carried over.")
  }

  # --- HVGs from SCT, ranked by residual variance ---
  hvg_all <- rownames(sce_obj)[rowData(sce_obj)$hvg]
  res_var <- apply(assay(sce_obj, "SCT_residuals")[hvg_all, , drop = FALSE], 1, var)
  top_HVG <- names(sort(res_var, decreasing = TRUE))[1:20]
  message("  Top HVG: ", paste(head(top_HVG, 3), collapse = ", "), " ...")

  # --- spatial coordinates from barcodes ---
  barcodes <- colnames(sce_obj)
  bin_x <- as.numeric(gsub(".*_([0-9]+)_[0-9]+-1", "\\1", barcodes))
  bin_y <- as.numeric(gsub(".*_[0-9]+_([0-9]+)-1", "\\1", barcodes))
  if (anyNA(bin_x) || anyNA(bin_y)) {
    warning(sum(is.na(bin_x) | is.na(bin_y)), " barcodes in ", nm,
            " did not match the coordinate pattern.")
  }

  expr_mat <- logcounts(sce_obj)

  plot_list <- lapply(top_HVG, function(gene) {
    df <- data.frame(
      x = bin_x,
      y = bin_y,
      expression = as.numeric(expr_mat[gene, ])
    )
    ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = y, color = expression)) +
      geom_point(size = 0.005, alpha = 0.5) +
      scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +
      coord_fixed() +
      theme_void() +
      labs(title = gene, color = "LogExpr") +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 10),
        legend.position = "none"
      )
  })

  combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plot_list, nrow = 4, ncol = 5)
  hvg_plots[[nm]] <- combined_plot
  print(combined_plot)

  message("Done: ", nm)
}

```



### Ploting of TOP50 genes {.tabset}
#### 8_um_bin
```{r 8_um_bin}
nm <- "obj1"
sce_obj <- sce_list[[nm]]

# --- guards ---
if (is.null(sce_obj)) {
  stop("sce_list[['", nm, "']] is NULL. Available: ",
       paste(names(sce_list), collapse = ", "))
}
if (!"logcounts" %in% assayNames(sce_obj)) {
  stop("No logcounts in ", nm, " - check what as.SingleCellExperiment() carried over.")
}

# --- HVGs from SCT ---
hvg_all <- rownames(sce_obj)[rowData(sce_obj)$hvg]
if (length(hvg_all) == 0) {
  stop("No HVGs flagged in rowData(", nm, ")$hvg - was this object built by loop 1?")
}

if ("SCT_residuals" %in% assayNames(sce_obj)) {
  # rank by residual variance
  res_var <- apply(assay(sce_obj, "SCT_residuals")[hvg_all, , drop = FALSE], 1, var)
  top_HVG <- names(sort(res_var, decreasing = TRUE))[seq_len(min(50, length(hvg_all)))]
} else {
  warning("No SCT_residuals assay - using unranked HVGs from rowData$hvg.")
  top_HVG <- head(hvg_all, 50)
}
message("Selected ", length(top_HVG), " HVGs; top 3: ",
        paste(head(top_HVG, 3), collapse = ", "))

# --- spatial coordinates ---
barcodes <- colnames(sce_obj)
bin_x <- as.numeric(gsub(".*_([0-9]+)_[0-9]+-1", "\\1", barcodes))
bin_y <- as.numeric(gsub(".*_[0-9]+_([0-9]+)-1", "\\1", barcodes))
if (anyNA(bin_x) || anyNA(bin_y)) {
  warning(sum(is.na(bin_x) | is.na(bin_y)), " barcodes did not match the coordinate pattern.")
}

expr_mat <- logcounts(sce_obj)

# --- plot one gene at a time ---
for (i in seq_along(top_HVG)) {
  gene <- top_HVG[i]
  message("Plotting ", i, "/", length(top_HVG), ": ", gene)
  df <- data.frame(x = bin_x, y = bin_y,
                   expression = as.numeric(expr_mat[gene, ]))
  p <- (
    ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = y, color = expression))
    + geom_point(size = 0.3, alpha = 0.6)
    + scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma")
    + coord_fixed()
    + theme_void()
    + labs(title = gene, color = "LogExpr")
    + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12))
  )
  print(p)
}


```


#### 16_um_bin
```{r 16_um_bin}
nm <- "obj2"
sce_obj <- sce_list[[nm]]

# --- guards ---
if (is.null(sce_obj)) {
  stop("sce_list[['", nm, "']] is NULL. Available: ",
       paste(names(sce_list), collapse = ", "))
}
if (!"logcounts" %in% assayNames(sce_obj)) {
  stop("No logcounts in ", nm, " - check what as.SingleCellExperiment() carried over.")
}

# --- HVGs from SCT ---
hvg_all <- rownames(sce_obj)[rowData(sce_obj)$hvg]
if (length(hvg_all) == 0) {
  stop("No HVGs flagged in rowData(", nm, ")$hvg - was this object built by loop 1?")
}

if ("SCT_residuals" %in% assayNames(sce_obj)) {
  # rank by residual variance
  res_var <- apply(assay(sce_obj, "SCT_residuals")[hvg_all, , drop = FALSE], 1, var)
  top_HVG <- names(sort(res_var, decreasing = TRUE))[seq_len(min(50, length(hvg_all)))]
} else {
  warning("No SCT_residuals assay - using unranked HVGs from rowData$hvg.")
  top_HVG <- head(hvg_all, 50)
}
message("Selected ", length(top_HVG), " HVGs; top 3: ",
        paste(head(top_HVG, 3), collapse = ", "))

# --- spatial coordinates ---
barcodes <- colnames(sce_obj)
bin_x <- as.numeric(gsub(".*_([0-9]+)_[0-9]+-1", "\\1", barcodes))
bin_y <- as.numeric(gsub(".*_[0-9]+_([0-9]+)-1", "\\1", barcodes))
if (anyNA(bin_x) || anyNA(bin_y)) {
  warning(sum(is.na(bin_x) | is.na(bin_y)), " barcodes did not match the coordinate pattern.")
}

expr_mat <- logcounts(sce_obj)

# --- plot one gene at a time ---
for (i in seq_along(top_HVG)) {
  gene <- top_HVG[i]
  message("Plotting ", i, "/", length(top_HVG), ": ", gene)
  df <- data.frame(x = bin_x, y = bin_y,
                   expression = as.numeric(expr_mat[gene, ]))
  p <- (
    ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = y, color = expression))
    + geom_point(size = 0.3, alpha = 0.6)
    + scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma")
    + coord_fixed()
    + theme_void()
    + labs(title = gene, color = "LogExpr")
    + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12))
  )
  print(p)
}

```


##Ploting of selected genes_16um_bin
```{r Ploting of selected genes_16um_bin}
nm <- "obj2"
sce_obj <- sce_list[[nm]]
if (!"logcounts" %in% assayNames(sce_obj)) {
  sce_obj <- logNormCounts(sce_obj)
}

genes_of_interest <- c("CCL19", "CXCL13", "CCL11", "IL33","IL6","ICAM1","VCAM1", "PDPN","INFG","TNF","STAT3","STAT1","STAT4","CD4","CD8","FOXP3","IL17A","RORC")

barcodes <- colnames(sce_obj)
bin_x <- as.numeric(gsub(".*_([0-9]+)_[0-9]+-1", "\\1", barcodes))
bin_y <- as.numeric(gsub(".*_[0-9]+_([0-9]+)-1", "\\1", barcodes))

for (i in seq_along(genes_of_interest)) {
  gene <- genes_of_interest[i]

  # Decide if the gene is detectable
  in_object   <- gene %in% rownames(sce_obj)
  expr        <- if (in_object) logcounts(sce_obj)[gene, ] else NULL
  detectable  <- in_object && any(expr > 0)

  message("Plotting ", i, "/", length(genes_of_interest), ": ", gene,
          if (!detectable) "  [not detectable]" else "")

  if (detectable) {
    df <- data.frame(x = bin_x, y = bin_y, expression = expr)
    df <- df[order(df$expression), ]          # positive spots on top
    p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = y, color = expression)) +
      geom_point(size = 0.3, alpha = 0.6) +
      scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +
      coord_fixed() + theme_void() +
      labs(title = gene, color = "LogExpr") +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12))

  } else {
    # grey tissue outline + "not detectable" annotation
    df <- data.frame(x = bin_x, y = bin_y)
    reason <- if (!in_object) "not in dataset" else "all zero"
    p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
      geom_point(size = 0.3, alpha = 0.4, color = "grey80") +
      coord_fixed() + theme_void() +
      labs(title = paste0(gene, " - not detectable")) +
      annotate("text", x = mean(range(bin_x, na.rm = TRUE)),
               y = mean(range(bin_y, na.rm = TRUE)),
               label = paste0("Not detectable\n(", reason, ")"),
               fontface = "italic", size = 4, color = "grey30") +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12))
  }

  print(p)
}
```


##Set up cell types
```{r Set up cell types}

my_signatures <- list(

  VEC        = c("PECAM1", "CDH5", "VWF", "EGFL7", "ICAM2", "ADGRL4","CALCRL", "S1PR1", "PLVAP", "AQP1", "ENG",                    "CD34"),
  Fb         = c("COL3A1","COL1A2", "CCL19","CXCL13", "VCAM1","ICAM1", "COL1A1"),
  PeriFb    = c("ACTA2","TAGLN","MYH11", "RGS5","NOTCH3"),
  Myeloid    = c("CTSS", "MRC1", "SIRPA", "PTPRC", "CSF1R", "P2RY6",
                 "HLA-DRA", "HLA-DRB1", "HLA-DPA1", "HLA-DPB1", "HLA-DQA1",
                 "CSF3R", "IL1B", "S100A9", "MMP9", "CXCR2", "C1QA", "LYZ", "AIF1", "FCER1G", "TYROBP", "CD68",                    "MS4A7"),
  Tcell      = c(  "CD3D", "CD3E", "CD3G", "CD247","TRAC", "TRBC1", "TRBC2","LCK", "ZAP70", "LAT", "ITK", "LCP2",                    "SKAP1", "THEMIS","BCL11B", "CD2", "CD6", "CD28", "CD27", "IL7R", "IL2RB"),

  Bcell   = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "CD37", "CD72","FCMR", "HVCN1", "ADAM28", "FCRL3", "POU2AF1","MZB1", "JCHAIN",                  "XBP1", "SEC11C", "SSR4", "TXNDC5", "FKBP11","IGKC", "IGHG1", "IGHG3", "IGHA1")
)


sig_present <- lapply(my_signatures, intersect, rownames(sce_obj))

for (s in names(my_signatures)) {
  missing <- setdiff(my_signatures[[s]], sig_present[[s]])
  message(s, ": ", length(sig_present[[s]]), "/", length(my_signatures[[s]]), " present",
          if (length(missing)) paste0("  MISSING: ", paste(missing, collapse = ", ")) else "")
}

# drop signatures too small to be meaningful
sig_use <- sig_present[lengths(sig_present) >= 3]


score_signature <- function(sce, genes) {
  mat <- SummarizedExperiment::assay(sce, "logcounts")[genes, , drop = FALSE]
  mat <- as.matrix(base::as.matrix(mat))     # force a real base matrix
  storage.mode(mat) <- "double"

  mu <- base::rowMeans(mat)
  sdv <- sqrt(base::rowSums((mat - mu)^2) / (ncol(mat) - 1))
  sdv[sdv == 0 | is.na(sdv)] <- 1            # zero-variance genes -> score 0

  z <- (mat - mu) / sdv                      # recycles down columns, correct here
  base::colMeans(z)
}

sig_scores <- sapply(sig_use, function(g) score_signature(sce_obj, g))
stopifnot(is.matrix(sig_scores), nrow(sig_scores) == ncol(sce_obj))
dim(sig_scores)

```



##Cell type projection
```{r Cell type projection}
barcodes <- colnames(sce_obj)
bin_x <- as.numeric(gsub(".*_([0-9]+)_[0-9]+-1", "\\1", barcodes))
bin_y <- as.numeric(gsub(".*_[0-9]+_([0-9]+)-1", "\\1", barcodes))
stopifnot(!anyNA(bin_x), !anyNA(bin_y))

sig_plots <- lapply(colnames(sig_scores), function(s) {
  df <- data.frame(x = bin_x, y = bin_y, score = sig_scores[, s])
  df <- df[order(df$score), ]
  lims <- quantile(df$score, c(0.01, 0.99), na.rm = TRUE)
  ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = y, color = score)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.4, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "magma", limits = lims, oob = scales::squish) +
    coord_fixed() + theme_void() +
    labs(title = s, color = "Score") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12))
})
names(sig_plots) <- colnames(sig_scores)
wrap_plots(sig_plots, ncol = 3)
```

##Cell type distribution
```{r Cell type distribution}
# --- drop dead signatures ---
sig_scores <- sig_scores[, apply(sig_scores, 2, sd) > 0, drop = FALSE]

# --- winner-take-all assignment ---
winner_idx  <- max.col(sig_scores, ties.method = "first")
winner      <- colnames(sig_scores)[winner_idx]
winner_score <- sig_scores[cbind(seq_len(nrow(sig_scores)), winner_idx)]

# runner-up, to measure how decisive the call is
runner_up <- apply(sig_scores, 1, function(v) sort(v, decreasing = TRUE)[2])
margin    <- winner_score - runner_up

# --- call bins "Unassigned" when the winner is weak ---
thr <- 0                                  # tune this
winner[winner_score < thr] <- "Unassigned"

table(winner)

cell_colors <- c(
  VEC        = "#ff7f0e",
  Fb         = "#2ca02c",
  Myeloid    = "#e377c2",
  Tcell      = "#bcbd22",
  Bcell      = "#17becf",
  PeriFb     = "#9467bd",
  Unassigned = "grey90"
)

df <- data.frame(
  x = bin_x, y = bin_y,
  label = factor(winner, levels = c(colnames(sig_scores), "Unassigned")),
  strength = winner_score
)
df <- df[order(df$label == "Unassigned", decreasing = TRUE), ]  # grey drawn first

ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = label)) +
  geom_tile(width = 1, height = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cell_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  coord_fixed() + theme_void() +
  labs(title = "Dominant signature per bin (16 µm)", fill = NULL) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))

```


##Cell type distribution_scaling
```{r Cell type distribution_scaling}

# only loop over columns we have a colour for
cts <- intersect(colnames(sig_scores), names(cell_colors))
missing_col <- setdiff(colnames(sig_scores), names(cell_colors))
if (length(missing_col))
  message("No colour defined, skipping: ", paste(missing_col, collapse = ", "))
stopifnot(length(cts) > 0)



score_plots <- list()
for (i in seq_along(cts)) {

  ct <- cts[i]
  message("Plotting ", i, "/", length(cts), ": ", ct)

  d    <- data.frame(x = bin_x, y = bin_y, score = sig_scores[, ct])
  lims <- quantile(d$score, c(0.01, 0.99), na.rm = TRUE)

  p <- ggplot(d, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = score)) +
    geom_tile(width = 1, height = 1) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey92", high = cell_colors[[ct]],
                        limits = lims, oob = scales::squish) +
    coord_fixed() + theme_void() +
    labs(title = ct, fill = "Score") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 11))

  score_plots[[ct]] <- p
  print(p)
}

wrap_plots(score_plots, ncol = 3)

```








## session info
```{r date and session info}
date()
sessionInfo()
```
